servoeasing_create.message0: create ServoEasing %1 on pin %2 start at %3 degree
servoeasing_create.tooltip: Create a ServoEasing object, attach it to a servo pin, and write the initial position.

servoeasing_create_custom.message0: create ServoEasing %1 on pin %2 start %3 map %4 us to %5 us as %6 to %7 degree
servoeasing_create_custom.tooltip: Attach a servo with custom pulse-width and logical degree mapping.

servoeasing_set_easing.tooltip: Select the easing curve used for the servo's next eased movement.

servoeasing_set_speed.message0: ServoEasing %1 set speed %2 degree per second
servoeasing_set_speed.tooltip: Set the default movement speed in degrees per second.

servoeasing_write.tooltip: Write a target angle or microsecond value immediately without easing.

servoeasing_ease_to.tooltip: Blocking eased move to a target angle or microsecond value at the selected speed.

servoeasing_ease_to_duration.tooltip: Blocking eased move that completes in the specified duration.

servoeasing_start_ease_to.message0: ServoEasing %1 start ease to %2 at speed %3 update %4
servoeasing_start_ease_to.tooltip: Start a non-blocking eased move. Use manual update mode when you will call update yourself.

servoeasing_start_ease_to_duration.message0: ServoEasing %1 start ease to %2 in %3 ms update %4
servoeasing_start_ease_to_duration.tooltip: Start a non-blocking eased move that completes in the specified duration.

servoeasing_update.tooltip: Update one servo manually and return true when the servo has stopped.

servoeasing_is_moving.tooltip: Return true while this servo is still moving.

servoeasing_current_microseconds.tooltip: Read the current servo pulse width in microseconds.

servoeasing_get_speed.tooltip: Return the configured speed in degrees per second.

servoeasing_get_move_duration.tooltip: Return the computed duration of the current or last move.

servoeasing_stop.tooltip: Stop the active movement for this servo.

servoeasing_pause.tooltip: Pause the active movement for this servo.

servoeasing_detach.tooltip: Detach the servo so no servo signal is generated.

servoeasing_reattach.tooltip: Reattach a previously detached servo using its saved pin and range.

servoeasing_set_trim.tooltip: Set a trim offset that is added to requested positions.

servoeasing_set_min_max.tooltip: Limit requested servo positions to a safe min and max range.

servoeasing_on_reached.tooltip: Run blocks when a non-blocking movement reaches its target.

servoeasing_all_set_easing.tooltip: Set the easing type for all attached ServoEasing objects.

servoeasing_all_set_speed.message0: all ServoEasing set speed %1 degree per second
servoeasing_all_set_speed.tooltip: Set the movement speed for all attached ServoEasing objects.

servoeasing_all_set_targets_2.tooltip: Set target positions for the first two attached servos in attach order.

servoeasing_all_set_targets_3.tooltip: Set target positions for the first three attached servos in attach order.

servoeasing_all_set_targets_4.tooltip: Set target positions for the first four attached servos in attach order.

servoeasing_all_start_synchronized.message0: all ServoEasing start synchronized at speed %1
servoeasing_all_start_synchronized.tooltip: Start all queued target moves synchronized and update by interrupt.

servoeasing_all_wait_synchronized.message0: all ServoEasing move synchronized and wait at speed %1
servoeasing_all_wait_synchronized.tooltip: Start all queued target moves synchronized and block until all servos stop.

servoeasing_all_update.message0: all ServoEasing update and all stopped
servoeasing_all_update.tooltip: Update all servos manually and return true when all have stopped.

servoeasing_all_is_moving.tooltip: Return true when at least one attached ServoEasing object is moving.
